description_long: This helmet features a robust, metallic exterior with a hammered texture, giving it a rugged and battle-ready appearance. The surface is primarily a dark bronze or brownish color, accented by four prominent, red, gem-like spikes positioned symmetrically around the crown. The front of the helmet has a black, angular face opening, providing visibility and protection for the wearer. The helmet's form is rounded and fully encloses the head, with no visible ventilation or retention system. The overall design is reminiscent of medieval or fantasy armor, with a focus on intimidation and protection. There are no visible logos, graphics, or additional adornments beyond the spikes.
description: A dark bronze, hammered metal helmet with four red spikes and a black angular face opening, evoking a medieval or fantasy style. The design is solid, fully enclosing the head, with no visible graphics or ventilation.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black angular face opening and the central red spike on the crown.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlights the hammered texture, two side spikes, and the helmet's solid back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, uninterrupted bronze surface and the rear spike.
description_view_3: Right rear angle reveals the right-side spike, hammered texture, and the edge of the face opening.
